entities.name: Analyzer
entities.context: A tool used for analyzing data in the workspace

entities.name: Proposal
entities.context: A tool used to create proposals from human input and JSON

entities.name: User Review
entities.context: A concept involving the review of proposals for approval

entities.name: Executor
entities.context: A tool that performs file operations after approval

entities.name: Workspace Files
entities.context: The collection of files used within the workspace

entities.name: Updated Workspace
entities.context: The state of the workspace after operations are performed

relationships.context: Workspace Files are analyzed by the Analyzer
Analyzer produces Analysis JSON from the data
The Analysis JSON is related to proposals
Proposals are sent for User Review
User Review results in Approved Actions
File Operations result in Updated Workspace
